prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为17086→13787→12571→10322→8362，呈持续前移趋势，5年累计前移8724名，年均前移约1745名，显示该校在江苏省物理类考生 中热度持续攀升；2025年基准位次约8362名；本省物理类计划2021年525人、2022年558人、2023年460人、2024年462人、2025年407人，呈先扩后缩趋势；2026 年计划503人，较2025年扩招96人（增幅约23.6%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第37 、2022年第33、2023年第36、2024年第37、2025年第38、2026年第36，近年稳定在36–38名区间，属于顶尖211高校，工科实力突出；2026年声誉评价为中性/混 合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第65、评价为"一般"，综合热度约47.2万，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；近年无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），光学工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程均获评A-，共4个A-及以上学科，兵器科学与技术为该校传统王牌，与招生 专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与南理工优势学科方向高度契合，推高报考热度；江苏省物理类考生数从2021年16.6万持续增长至2025年26.1万，2026年总考生约52.1万，按近年物理类占比约72.8%估算物理类考生约37.9万，较2025年大幅增加约45%，竞争显著 加剧；省控线方面，江苏物理类本科批从2021年417分逐年上升至2025年463分，整体难度稳定；南京理工大学位于江苏省南京市，为本省高校，对本省考生有天 然地域吸引力；该校在江苏省招生计划占比较大，2025年物理类407人占该校全国物理类招生主体。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+23.6%）对位次的推后效应、江苏省 物理类考生大幅增加（约+45%）带来的竞争加剧、以及该校近年位次持续前移的强势趋势，扩招缓解效应与考生增加竞争效应相互对冲后，竞争仍略趋激烈；预测2026年物理类最 低位次约9346名，区间8846–9846名。

一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 电子信息类（电子科学与技术、电子信息工程、光电信息科学与工程、通信工程）
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化、智能电网信息工程）
- 兵器类（武器系统与工程、弹药工程与爆炸技术）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约9346名，区间8846–9846名。位次在区间下限（8846名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类）；位次在区间中段（约9346名）建议以二 档专业为主、一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（9846名）附近建议以三档江阴校区专业保底，同时可尝试二档专业。南理工鼎新创新人才班、钱学森学院等特殊培养项目位次要求更高 （约4000–5500名），远超预测区间，不建议作为主要目标。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were 17086 → 13787 → 12571 → 10322 → 8362, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative advancement of 8724 positions over 5 years, averaging about 1745 positions per year, indicating rising popularity among Jiangsu Physics Category candidates; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8362; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 525 in 2021, 558 in 2022, 460 in 2023, 462 in 2024, and 407 in 2025, showing an initial expansion followed by contraction; the 2026 plan is 503, an increase of 96 (about 23.6%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 37th in 2021, 33rd in 2022, 36th in 2023, 37th in 2024, 38th in 2025, and 36th in 2026, stable in the 36–38 range, belonging to top-tier 211 universities with outstanding engineering strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 65th, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 472,000, short video exposure at a medium level, no obvious signs of increased application attention; no recent admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+ (national top), Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering were all rated A-, totaling 4 A- and above disciplines, with Armament Science and Technology being the university's traditional ace, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly aligned with NJUST's advantageous disciplines, boosting application popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province grew from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with total candidates in 2026 about 521,000, estimated Physics Category candidates about 379,000 based on the recent proportion of about 72.8%, a significant increase of about 45% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for Jiangsu Physics Category undergraduate batch rose from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, with overall difficulty stable; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a provincial university with natural regional appeal to local candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu Province accounts for a large proportion, with 407 Physics Category candidates in 2025 forming the main body of its national Physics Category enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion in 2026 (+23.6%) pushing rankings back, the substantial increase in Jiangsu Physics Category candidates (about +45%) intensifying competition, and the university's strong trend of continuous ranking advancement in recent years, the expansion mitigation effect and the candidate increase competition effect offset each other, with competition still slightly intensifying; the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is about 9346, with a range of 8846–9846.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Smart Grid Information Engineering)
- Armament (Weapon Systems and Engineering, Ammunition Engineering and Explosion Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Robotics Engineering)
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Physics, Nanomaterials and Technology)
- Mathematics (Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics)
- Aerospace (Aircraft Design and Engineering, Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Jiangyin Campus)
- Cyberspace Security (Jiangyin Campus)
- New Energy Science and Engineering (Jiangyin Campus)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Jiangyin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 9346, range 8846–9846. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (8846) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation); those around the middle (about 9346) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a sprint; those near the upper limit (9846) are advised to use Tier 3 Jiangyin Campus majors as a safety net, while also attempting Tier 2 majors. NJUST's Dingxin Innovation Talent Class, Qian Xuesen College, and other special training programs require higher rankings (about 4000–5500), far beyond the predicted range, and are not recommended as primary targets.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次分别为4157→3902→4244→3681→3741，整体在3600–4200区间波动，无明显单边趋势，近3年波动幅度约500名；2025年基准位次约3741 名；本省历史类计划2021年37人、2022年50人、2023年60人、2024年50人、2025年70人，呈扩招趋势；2026年计划50人，较2025年缩招20人（降幅约28.6 %），缩招幅度较大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名稳定在36–38名区间，但该校为理工类院校，历史类招生专业较少（仅法学、英语、语言 学、公共事业管理等），对历史类考生整体吸引力有限；2026年声誉评价中性/混合；抖音热度排名第65、评价"一般"，未出现明显报考关注升温；该校作为理 工院校，在历史类考生中的知名度与关注度相对低于同层次综合类院校；南理工优势学科集中于工科（化学工程与技术A+、光学工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、机 械工程A-），历史类招生专业（法学、语言学、英语等）无直接对应的A类学科支撑，学科吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度2024–2026年处于"分化观望"状态， 就业竞争激烈；语言类专业热度"一般观望"；江苏省历史类考生数2021年9.5万→2025年9.7万，基本稳定；2026年总考生约52.1万，按近年历史类占比约27.2%估算历史类考生约14 .2万，较2025年增长约46%，竞争显著加剧；省控线方面，江苏历史类本科批从2021年476分升至2025年482分，整体稳定；南京理工大学位于江苏省南京市，为 本省高校，对本省历史类考生有一定地域吸引力，但该校历史类专业规模小、学科优势不突出。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年历史类大幅缩招（-28.6%）对位次的前移效应、江苏 省历史类考生大幅增加（约+46%）带来的竞争加剧、以及该校历史类专业学科吸引力有限等因素，考生规模增加带来的竞争压力大于缩招带来的位次前移效应；预测2026年历史类 最低位次约3250名，区间2750–3750名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 4157 → 3902 → 4244 → 3681 → 3741, fluctuating within the 3600–4200 range with no clear unilateral trend, and a fluctuation range of about 500 places in the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3741; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 37 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 60 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 70 in 2025, showing an expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 50, a reduction of 20 from 2025 (a decrease of about 28.6%), which is a significant reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science ranking is stable in the 36–38 range, but as a science and engineering institution, it offers few History Category majors (only Law, English, Linguistics, Public Administration, etc.), with limited overall appeal to History Category candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity ranking is 65th with a rating of 'average', showing no significant increase in application interest; as a science and engineering university, its visibility and attention among History Category candidates are relatively lower than comprehensive universities of the same level; NJUST's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Optical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-), and the History Category majors (Law, Linguistics, English, etc.) have no directly corresponding A-class discipline support, limiting disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Law major from 2024 to 2026 is in a state of 'differentiation and wait-and-see', with fierce employment competition; the popularity of Language majors is 'average wait-and-see'; the number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province was 95,000 in 2021 → 97,000 in 2025, basically stable; the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 521,000, and based on the recent History Category proportion of about 27.2%, the estimated History Category candidates are about 142,000, an increase of about 46% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; regarding the provincial control line, the Jiangsu History Category undergraduate batch rose from 476 points in 2021 to 482 points in 2025, overall stable; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and as a provincial university, it has some regional appeal to local History Category candidates, but its History Category majors are small in scale and lack prominent disciplinary advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026 (-28.6%) which pushes rankings forward, the sharp increase in History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province (about +46%) which intensifies competition, and the limited disciplinary appeal of the university's History Category majors, the competitive pressure from the increase in candidate numbers outweighs the ranking forward effect from enrollment reduction; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 3250, with a range of 2750–3750.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law (First year at Jiangyin Campus)
- Linguistics (Intelligent Processing of Language Information) (First year at Jiangyin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- English (Only English-speaking candidates) (First year at Jiangyin Campus)
- Digital Public Governance (First year at Jiangyin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Social Work (First year at Jiangyin Campus)
- Japanese (Foreign-related Legal Practice) (First year at Jiangyin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3250, with a range of 2750–3750. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (2750) can focus on sprinting for the Tier 1 Law major; those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 3250) are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 English and Digital Public Governance; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (3750) are advised to use Tier 3 Social Work and Japanese as safety options. NJUST has few History Category majors (only 6), all of which are general liberal arts majors lacking A-class discipline support. When applying, it is recommended to consider personal interests and career plans comprehensively.
